title: Portable Context Control Plane — Prompt Family Enum
description: The 10 valid promptFamily enum values for the MVP. Canonical owner: docs/06 §2.2. Every selector depends on this value. Unknown values must be substituted with 'general_default' by the orchestrator before fan-out — substitution is not a halt condition. Canonical substitution rule: docs/06 §2.2.
$comment: Pass 4.9C-2A — Batch A. No code. No runtime. No provider/model calls. Canonical source: docs/06 §2.2 and docs/12 §3.3.

PromptFamilyValue.title: PromptFamily string enum
PromptFamilyValue.description: Re-export of the root enum for use as a $ref target in dependent schemas. Identical to root — provided for $ref convenience.
